# Skills catalog (curated)

The repository no longer ships the full ClaudeKit skill tree under `.claude/skills/`. **Authoritative skill packs for agents and Cursor** live under **`.cursor/skills/`** (workflow, CABTA-friendly engineering, GitNexus, MCP).

**Machine-readable catalog:** [`SKILLS.yaml`](SKILLS.yaml) is regenerated by `python .claude/scripts/scan_skills.py` (same run updates `.cursor/skills/ck-help/scripts/skills_data.yaml`).

## Index (paths relative to repo root)

| Skill | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| [`.cursor/skills/plan/SKILL.md`](../.cursor/skills/plan/SKILL.md) | Implementation planning |
| [`.cursor/skills/cook/SKILL.md`](../.cursor/skills/cook/SKILL.md) | Feature implementation orchestration |
| [`.cursor/skills/fix/SKILL.md`](../.cursor/skills/fix/SKILL.md) | Bugfix workflow |
| [`.cursor/skills/debug/SKILL.md`](../.cursor/skills/debug/SKILL.md) | Systematic debugging |
| [`.cursor/skills/test/SKILL.md`](../.cursor/skills/test/SKILL.md) | Running tests / QA |
| [`.cursor/skills/code-review/SKILL.md`](../.cursor/skills/code-review/SKILL.md) | Code review gate |
| [`.cursor/skills/scout/SKILL.md`](../.cursor/skills/scout/SKILL.md) | Codebase scouting |
| [`.cursor/skills/context-engineering/SKILL.md`](../.cursor/skills/context-engineering/SKILL.md) | Context / token efficiency |
| [`.cursor/skills/docs-seeker/SKILL.md`](../.cursor/skills/docs-seeker/SKILL.md) | Library docs lookup (llms.txt / context7) |
| [`.cursor/skills/docs/SKILL.md`](../.cursor/skills/docs/SKILL.md) | Project documentation |
| [`.cursor/skills/git/SKILL.md`](../.cursor/skills/git/SKILL.md) | Git / commits |
| [`.cursor/skills/mcp-management/SKILL.md`](../.cursor/skills/mcp-management/SKILL.md) | MCP server tooling |
| [`.cursor/skills/use-mcp/SKILL.md`](../.cursor/skills/use-mcp/SKILL.md) | Using MCP tools |
| [`.cursor/skills/ck-help/SKILL.md`](../.cursor/skills/ck-help/SKILL.md) | ClaudeKit help (discovers commands from this subset) |
| [`.cursor/skills/frontend-development/SKILL.md`](../.cursor/skills/frontend-development/SKILL.md) | React / TS frontend |
| [`.cursor/skills/backend-development/SKILL.md`](../.cursor/skills/backend-development/SKILL.md) | Backend APIs |
| [`.cursor/skills/web-testing/SKILL.md`](../.cursor/skills/web-testing/SKILL.md) | Playwright / web tests |
| [`.cursor/skills/gitnexus/`](../.cursor/skills/gitnexus/) | GitNexus MCP / graph-assisted navigation |

Shared helpers: [`.cursor/skills/common/`](../.cursor/skills/common/)

## CABTA product work

Use **`CABTA/docs/ONBOARDING.md`** first; skills above supplement workflow — they are not a substitute for CABTA architecture docs.

## Environment variables for skills

See [ENVIRONMENT_RESOLVER.md](./ENVIRONMENT_RESOLVER.md) — paths now prefer **`.cursor/skills/`** where applicable.
